mapper.sql: category_id, title, summary, content, cover_url, status, is_top, is_recommend, published_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update:
update article
category_id = #{categoryId},
title = #{title},
summary = #{summary},
content = #{content},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
status = #{status}, published_at = case when #{status} = 'published' and published_at is null then #{updatedAt} else published_at end,
is_top = #{isTop},
is_recommend = #{isRecommend},
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: a.id, a.category_id, c.name as category_name, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_url, a.status, a.is_top, a.is_recommend, a.view_count, a.comment_count, a.published_at, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select:
select
from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id
and ( a.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.summary like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and a.status = #{status}
and a.category_id = #{categoryId}
and exists ( select 1 from article_tag at_filter where at_filter.article_id = a.id and at_filter.tag_id = #{tagId} )
order by a.is_top desc, a.published_at desc nulls last, a.created_at desc, a.id desc
select , a.content from article a left join category c on c.id = a.category_id where a.id = #{id}
